### Reconstruction status (400/446 reconstructed)

![[fables/Datasets/odm-maps-bond_ave-2026-02-21-house-2/reconstruction_status.png]]

46 images dropped -- see [[fables/Datasets/odm-maps-bond_ave-2026-02-21-house-2/dropped-images]] for full list and map. Drops cluster in the NW; a cluster in the mid-NE sits directly over the problem north wall.

## Commentary

Variant of the 2026-02-21 house run with a **looser lasso** around the house (compared to [[odm-maps-bond_ave-2026-02-21-house]]). Same imagery and similar ODM settings; different boundary/crop.
Textured model is MUCH better than [[odm-maps-bond_ave-2026-02-16]] - this is basically usable (the house itself) except that one wall looks icky. 
I think I've been calling it the eastern wall but it's the North wall that ends up with the corner about 2m from the actual corner, and some wild brush and twigs projected onto it. 

![[Pasted image 20260228130932.png]]

Orthophoto is generally okay, a little soupy, then quite weird near that north wall, and some strange waviness near the water feature by the garage.
## Processing Notes

- Ran on [[Lancer]], launched from ~/WebODM in WSL
- Same inputs as house run; boundary changed to looser crop.
- **Also changed vs house:** min_num_features: 30000 (house used default 10000). Resulted in 3x more features/image, 2.6x more initial points (563k vs 214k), and 21 more reconstructed shots (400 vs 379).

*Doc created/updated 2026-02-28 per [[odm-maps-data-collection]].*

| pc_classify           | true                      |

| pc_quality            | high                      |
